title: Tending the base
premise: The ordinary upkeep of a place that's yours.

stages.narration: An hour where nothing is trying to kill you is its own kind of work: things to be sorted and set right. The place holds because you keep making it hold.

choices.label: Inventory and set the stores in order
Build a small comfort into the place with the scrap you have
Do nothing useful and simply rest

notes: holding-the-base, requiresShelter — the recurring base beat, distinct from the one-shot the-night-watch (which shores the barricade for stress relief). Here sorting trades time for calm; improving spends scrap for morale (the satisfaction of bettering the place, not defensive shoring — kept mechanically distinct from night-watch's scrap sink); resting trades time and a little guilt for fatigue. Anchors FR-CNT-04 at every safehouse.
